In Brooklyn, Coney Island-bound [F] runs express from Jay St-MetroTech to Kings Hwy
In Brooklyn, Coney Island-bound [F] runs express from Jay St-MetroTech to Kings Hwy

Trains stop at 7 Av, Church Av and 18 Av.

For service to Bergen St, Carroll St, Smith-9 Sts, 4 Av-9 St, 15 St-Prospect Park and Fort Hamilton Pkwy, take the [F] to 7 Av or Church Av and transfer to a Manhattan-bound [F].

For service to Ditmas Av, Avenue I, Bay Pkwy, Avenue N and Avenue P, take the [F] to 18 Av or Kings Hwy and transfer to a Manhattan-bound [F].

For service from these stations, take the [F] to 18 Av, Church Av, 7 Av or Jay St-MetroTech and transfer to a Coney Island-bound [F].

Note: No [G] service between Church Av and Hoyt-Schermerhorn Sts during this time.

What's happening?
We're modernizing signals

[G] runs in two sections:
1. Between Court Sq and Bedford-Nostrand Avs
2. Between Bedford-Nostrand Avs and Hoyt-Schermerhorn Sts, every 20 minutes
(All trains board/depart from the Court Sq-bound platform between Bedford-Nostrand Avs and Hoyt-Schermerhorn Sts)
Transfer at Bedford-Nostrand Avs to continue your trip.
For Bergen St *, Carroll St *, Smith-9 Sts *, 4 Av-9 St *, 7 Av, 15 St-Prospect Park *, Fort Hamilton Pkwy * and Church Av, take the [F] instead.
Transfer between [G] and [A][C] trains at Hoyt-Schermerhorn Sts
Transfer between [A][C] and [F] trains at Jay St-MetroTech
*Only Manhattan-bound service during this time.

What's happening?
